items.caption: A legal document titled "district court" with a section labeled "suggestions for jury service." below this, there is a statement instructing the reader to "please bring this upper section with you when you report for jury duty." the document includes a circular emblem with the letters "c.a." inside it, and there is a note at the bottom indicating that the court summons are to appear for jury duty beginning on the date, time, and place shown below. the document is overlaid with a series of questions, each followed by a letter (a, b, c, d), and the corresponding answers are highlighted in purple. the questions and answers relate to the legal document and its purpose. the image has a watermark with the text "response grid" and a reference number "ss.7.c.2.2." the style of the image is informational and educational, likely intended for a legal or educational context.
